statement: In every magma, Equation 2363 (`x = (y * (y * (z * w))) * u`) implies Equation 3842 (`x * y = (z * w) * (y * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0965
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op y (op z w))) u)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op (op z w) (op y y))
